Jordan Lee | Austin, TX, US

| Area | Evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Experience | 7 years operating Linux services, Kubernetes clusters, Terraform modules, CI/CD pipelines, and incident response rotations. |
| Recent role | Site Reliability Engineer for a payments platform; reduced deploy failures, built Prometheus dashboards, and automated runbooks. |
| Search target | Remote or hybrid SRE, DevOps Engineer, Platform Engineer, or Infrastructure Engineer roles. |
| Compensation | Looking for base salary of at least 130000 USD. |
| Avoid | Pure management roles and desktop support roles. |
